introParagraph1: Specializing at the intersection of digital art and cutting-edge technology, my focus encompasses the creation of large-scale 3D environments, the development of complex dynamic simulations, and the technical execution of top-quality visual experiences.
introParagraph2:
I lead the conceptualization and technical development of projects in non-conventional formats, with a special focus on Augmented Reality (AR), Virtual Reality (VR), and videomapping for museum spaces, international brands, and audiovisual productions. I manage every phase of the project, from initial art direction to final technical delivery.
My workflow combines a strong artistic vision with the technical rigor of high-performance productions. I have advanced proficiency in 3D animation methodologies and real-time development. I apply advanced processes for rendering optimization, compositing, and post-production, ensuring top-tier finishes. Furthermore, I actively integrate experimental Artificial Intelligence tools into my conceptualization and production pipelines.

I have extensive experience directing and coordinating multidisciplinary teams to ensure flawless execution in high-resolution projects under tight deadlines, without ever compromising quality. My goal is to solve complex challenges through innovative digital solutions, connecting interactive design with the latest industry technologies.

disciplines.name: 2D/3D Motion Graphics
disciplines.description: Colors, shapes, textures and feelings — essential for communication.

disciplines.name: Videomapping
disciplines.description: Every place has a story, everything is a canvas to complete.

disciplines.name: VJing
disciplines.description: Listening to light. The art of intensifying sensations through music.
